extraction.one_line_summary: DUMOULIN Tom won the stage 20 ITT by 1 second over FROOME Chris, while THOMAS Geraint secured overall victory by minimizing losses.
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN rode without power meter or splits, relying purely on perceived exertion to beat FROOME by 1 second.
Top 3 GC riders were also top 3 TT performers, revealing pre-ITT podium positions accurately reflected time trialing ability.
FROOME's aggressive ITT displaced ROGLIC from podium, showing time bonuses alone don't protect weak time trialists.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Won TT without telemetry or splits, showing exceptional instinct-based pacing discipline under pressure
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Second by 1 second despite no GC pressure, demonstrating sustained peak form late in grand tour
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Third-fastest TT secured GC without team support in top 20, showing complete rider rather than team-dependent leader
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost podium to FROOME's superior ITT, exposed as vulnerable when GC margins enter time trialing range
